name: Indoor Golf Design
address: BY APPOINTMENT ONLY, 4360 W Chandler Blvd # 5, Chandler, AZ 85226
about: Indoor Golf Design is a high-end provider of custom golf simulator installations, specializing in bespoke virtual golf and sports simulator rooms for homes and commercial spaces. With over 20 years of industry experience, their team integrates design, custom manufacturing, and installation into a streamlined process, ensuring each simulator is uniquely tailored to the client's space and needs. They offer a comprehensive service, including 3D room design, collaboration with architects and builders, and the integration of advanced launch monitor technology to create an unparalleled golf simulation experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Completely customized simulator rooms designed from the ground up
Over 20 years of experience with top-tier simulator technology
On-site PGA Professionals for expert guidance and game improvement

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy allows food and drink to be brought in for personal use.
BYOB policy allows alcohol to be brought in for personal use.

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced launch and ball flight tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, this venue operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy, allowing you to bring food and drinks for personal use.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary, but a typical round on a golf simulator takes approximately 1 to 2 hours, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Indoor Golf Design is family-friendly and can design spaces to accommodate families, including transforming rooms into family areas suitable for all ages.
